summary: Tested AI Agent Persistent Memory feature. All 16 tests passed. Memory persistence verified in MongoDB collection 'agent_memories' with 18+ memories stored. All 4 agents (business, assistant, operations, analytics) working with persistent memory.

features_tested.details: Returns 4 agents (business, assistant, operations, analytics) all with has_memory=true and supports_conversations=true
Multi-turn conversation works with same conversation_id
Returns stored memories with type, content, importance, created_at, tags
Returns conversation history with roles (user/assistant), content, timestamp
Preference stored successfully with key-value pairs
Pattern learned successfully with pattern_type and pattern_data
Process, memory, and conversations endpoints all working
Verified 18 memories in 'agent_memories' collection with correct structure

ai_agents_memory: GET /api/ai-agents/available - Returns all 4 agents with has_memory=true
POST /api/ai-agents/{agent}/process - Processes prompt, returns conversation_id and memory_updated=true
GET /api/ai-agents/{agent}/memory - Returns stored memories for user

critical_code_review_comments: Memory persistence working correctly - data stored in MongoDB 'agent_memories' collection
All 4 agents properly initialized with shared PersistentMemoryManager
Conversation history tracked with unique conversation_id
Rule-based fallback working when LLM not available (confidence=0.5-0.9)
seed_data_creation: 18 memories created in agent_memories collection during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Agent Persistent Memory fully working. All 4 agents (business, assistant, operations, analytics) have persistent memory via shared PersistentMemoryManager. MongoDB collection 'agent_memories' stores all memories. Key endpoints: /api/ai-agents/{agent}/process (returns conversation_id, memory_updated), /api/ai-agents/{agent}/memory, /api/ai-agents/{agent}/conversations, /api/ai-agents/{agent}/learn. Rule-based fallback works when LLM unavailable.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
